title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Brigade Group - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!
